channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: SEC and Binance request 60-day pause in lawsuit as the agency shifts to be more crypto-friendly
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is seeking to pause its high-profile lawsuit against the cryptocurrency exchange Binance as the regulator tries to present itself as more crypto-friendly under a new administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: SoftBank reveals $2.4 billion loss in Q3
item.description: Japanese technology company SoftBank Group Corp. reported a 369.2 billion yen ($2.4 billion) loss for the fiscal third quarter as it racked up red ink from its Vision Fund investments. That’s compared to a 950 billion yen profit in October-December 2023.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Who is Alexander Vinnik, Russian exchanged for Marc Fogel
item.description: The U.S. is expected to release Russian prisoner Alexander Vinnik, a cryptocurrency kingpin, in exchange for American Marc Fogel, who was freed by Russia earlier this week, the White House confirmed Wednesday. Fogel returned to the U.S. late Tuesday evening in an emotional homecoming.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: AI company Ross Intelligence loses copyright fight with Thomson Reuters
item.description: A US judge has ruled in favor of Thomson Reuters in a AI training fight against Ross Intelligence, a legal AI startup, according to The Verge. Thomson Reuters sued Ross Intelligence in 2020 for using the company’s legal research platform Westlaw to train Ross Intelligence’s AI without permission.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A deep-sea neutrino telescope spots the most energetic ghost particle yet
item.description: A neutrino detector submerged in the Mediterranean Sea has sniffed out the most energetic ghost particle yet.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Want to use ChatGPT Deep Research for free? Sam Altman confirms how often you’ll be able to use the new AI agent
item.description: Sam Altman has essentially confirmed how often ChatGPT Plus and free users will be able to use the new AI agent, Deep Research.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: Apple just unveiled its most ambitious health study yet – here's how you can take part with just an iPhone
item.description: Apple has unveiled a new holistic health study that could change the way we think about health and technology.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: We've barely seen AMD's RDNA 4 GPUs in action yet, but a new rumor suggests we could be getting an Nvidia RTX 5090 competitor at last
item.description: Nvidia is, as usual, leading the GPU market, but if this new rumor is true, there could be some serious competition down the line.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple contemplates SMB, enterprise as its next major revenue stream as it launches a new partner program
item.description: Apple targets SMBs and enterprises with revamped partner program, aimed at boosting Mac sales and expanding business footprint.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The Brave browser gets built-in functionality to run custom scripts
item.description: It’s been possible for a while now to modify web pages using popular extensions such as Tampermonkey and Greasemonkey, which can be useful for avoiding annoying ads or tracking attempts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Review: Zencoder has a vision for AI coding
item.description: Zencoder is an AI coding assistant with interfaces to Visual Studio Code and JetBrains IDEs. It is designed to help developers ship products faster, much like GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q Developer, and Tabnine.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: News influencers favored Trump over Harris during campaign, study finds
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Americans who followed news influencers during the presidential campaign were more likely to hear positive reports about Donald Trump than they were about Kamala Harris, a study has revealed.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cisco launches AI Renewals Agent with Mistral AI
item.description: Cisco rolled out its first of many AI agents codeveloped with partner Mistral AI, a genAI and large language model (LLM) startup.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Ex-Treasury secretaries express worries over DOGE payment systems
item.description: Former Treasury Secretaries penned an op-ed Monday expressing their concerns that officials at Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) gained access to the federal payment systems.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Trump's AI ambition and China's DeepSeek overshadow an AI summit in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The geopolitics of artificial intelligence will be in focus at a major summit in France where world leaders, executives and experts will hammer out pledges on guiding the development of the rapidly advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Latino workers working to overcome a technological divide brought on by automation, AI
item.description: As jobs become more reliant on technology some Latino workers can be left behind due to a lack of digital skills exacerbated by a lack of accessibility.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmakers turn to IGs to investigate DOGE access to agency data
item.description: Democrats are turning to inspector general's offices, including those swept up in Trump's firing of several IG's last month, to investigate DOGE's data access. The post Lawmakers turn to IGs to investigate DOGE access to agency data first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Government Procurement Efficiency List: Reducing Regulatory Burden
item.description: Some regulations impose compliance or administrative costs/burdens that have no relation to the work to be performed under a government contract. The post Government Procurement Efficiency List: Reducing Regulatory Burden first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Roger Waldron, Federal News Network

item.title: Amazon to pay nearly $4M to settle lawsuit alleging it took tips from drivers
item.description: Amazon has agreed to pay nearly $4 million to settle charges that the e-commerce company subsidized its labor costs by taking tips its delivery drivers received from customers, District of Columbia Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: AWS plans to outspend Microsoft and Google on AI infrastructure
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) intends to invest $100 billion in ramping up infrastructure for AI cloud services this year, surpassing the spending plans of rivals Microsoft and Google.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Full-stack JavaScript leads the way
item.description: Building web apps begins with a simple premise, but the real-world experience is a juggling act of optimizations, best practices, toolchains, and so on. Developers tend to respond by doing what we do best: creating new tools and techniques to manage ever-changing demands.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The hidden threat of neglected cloud infrastructure
item.description: In 2012, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) issued a public advisory regarding software to monitor and control building systems.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New law in Brazil is making students put away their smartphones at school
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian students returned to class this week with a new task: staying away from their smartphones as a new law restricting their use in schools took effect.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups
item.description: GSA senior leaders are saying the Trump administration’s long-term goal is to merge GSA, OPM and OMB into a single agency. The post GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Google scraps its diversity hiring goals as it complies with Trump's new government contractor rules
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is scrapping some of its diversity hiring targets, joining a lengthening list of U.S. companies that have abandoned or scaled back their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nvidia claims near 50% boost in AI storage speed
item.description: Nvidia is touting a near 50% improvement in storage read bandwidth thanks to intelligence in its Spectrum-X Ethernet networking equipment, according to the vendor’s technical blog post.
item.dc:creator: Network World
